Applying to 10011000
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 72 = AND(I 7,I 2) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 AND 03 = AND(I 0,I 3) = AND(1,1) = 1
2 AND 14 = AND(I 1,I 4) = AND(0,1) = 0
3 MAJ 250 = MAJ(I 2,I 5,I 0) = MAJ(0,0,1) = 0
4 MAJ 361 = MAJ(I 3,I 6,I 1) = MAJ(1,0,0) = 0
5 MAJ 472 = MAJ(I 4,I 7,I 2) = MAJ(1,0,0) = 0
6 AND 35 = AND(I 3,I 5) = AND(1,0) = 0
7 AND 46 = AND(I 4,I 6) = AND(1,0) = 0

\boxed{01000000}
